title: Siemens U273 B11 active BJT first-order small-signal estimates
status: parameter estimates from verified DC branch currents; not yet full active B11 MNA

qPointCurrents.name: Ts1_from_R11
qPointCurrents.note: Current through R11 from N215=21.5 V to N10=10 V. This is a local branch current, not a closed collector current.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts1_N05_resistive_demand_low
qPointCurrents.note: Lower bound of resistive current demanded around N05=0.5 V from R12, R9, R7/R8.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts1_N05_resistive_demand_high
qPointCurrents.note: Upper bound of resistive current demanded around N05=0.5 V from R12, R9, R7/R8.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts2_N9_main
qPointCurrents.note: R16 plus R13 current at N9=9 V with N05 about 0.5 V.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts2_R15_supply
qPointCurrents.note: Current supplied by R15 from 24 V to N145=14.5 V.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts3_R23_supply
qPointCurrents.note: Current supplied by R23 from 24 V to N23=23 V.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts3_Ts4_local_100ohm_if_full_0p45V
qPointCurrents.note: If a 100 ohm resistor really sees 0.45 V, current is 4.5 mA. This is a local check, not a proved transistor current.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts5_Ts6_1ohm_10mV
qPointCurrents.note: Emitter resistor R28/R29 current if the 1 ohm resistor drop is 10 mV.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts5_Ts6_1ohm_50mV
qPointCurrents.note: Emitter resistor R28/R29 current if the 1 ohm resistor drop is 50 mV.

qPointCurrents.name: Ts5_Ts6_1ohm_100mV
qPointCurrents.note: Emitter resistor R28/R29 current if the 1 ohm resistor drop is 100 mV.
